message:
fix: show offline instead of error when kc-agent is unreachable on settings save (#11137)

When the local kc-agent is not running, saveToBackend() was setting
syncStatus to 'error' after all retry attempts failed, displaying a
red "Save failed" message in the Settings panel.

The initial loadSettings() already handles this correctly — it catches
network errors and sets syncStatus to 'offline' (showing a neutral
"Local only" indicator). The save path was inconsistent.

Fix: capture the thrown error in the retry loop and check if it is a
TypeError (network/connection failure). If so, set 'offline' instead of
'error' to match the load-path behaviour and avoid the misleading red
error shown to users whose kc-agent is simply not running.

HTTP errors (agent running but returning 5xx) still surface as 'error'.

Fixes #11134

Signed-off-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
